title: nuw' #5106
definition:
1) to hinder, hold back, forbid, disallow, restrain, frustrate
    1a) (Qal) to hinder, hold back
    1b) (Hiphil)
        1b1) to restrain, forbid, frustrate
        1b2) to restrain, make averse, discourage
